organic-the-best-way-to-send-money-abroa.hook: The best way to send money abroad is literally built into your phone — and most people have no idea

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator holds phone to camera, opens Speed Wallet app live — 'I'm about to send $200 to Mexico right now.' Beat 2 (9-25s): Screen-record of selecting recipient, entering amount, fee line reads $0.00 — 'Zero. Fees. Watch.' Beat 3 (26-45s): Recipient's phone buzzes with notification on split screen or reaction clip — 'It landed in seconds.' Beat 4 (46-60s): Creator faces camera — 'Banks charged my family 7% for years. Never again. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Film screen-record natively on iPhone; use TikTok green-screen effect to overlay app UI on talking-head. Natural lighting, no studio needed. Caption: '$0 fee send 👇 #remittance #bitcoin #sendmoney #lightning'.

organic-my-family-back-home-was-losing-4.hook: My family back home was losing $40 every time I sent money — until I found this

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator at kitchen table, emotional tone — 'I used to send $300, my mom would get $258. Every single time.' Beat 2 (9-25s): Quick text-on-screen graphic: 'Western Union fee: $14.99 + 3% FX markup = ~$40 gone.' Beat 3 (26-45s): Phone screen shows Speed Wallet send — recipient amount matches sender amount exactly. Beat 4 (46-60s): Creator smiles — 'She gets every dollar now. Bitcoin Lightning. Free. Fast. Try it — link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: UGC style — one take, vertical, authentic emotion outperforms polish here. Overlay fee-comparison graphic using CapCut text tool (free). Target diaspora hashtags: #remittance #sendmoneyhome #latinx #filipinoamerican.

organic-bitcoin-has-been-declared-dead-4.hook: Bitcoin has been declared dead 472 times. Here's what happened if you ignored the headlines

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Fast text-on-screen montage of fake 'Bitcoin is dead' headlines — hook delivered as VO. Beat 2 (9-28s): Simple price chart graphic — '$1 in 2010 = $X today' — 'Every time they said it was over, it came back stronger.' Beat 3 (29-45s): Pivot — 'And now you can actually USE it — send money internationally for free, in seconds, no bank.' Beat 4 (46-60s): Screen-record of Speed Wallet Lightning send completing — 'This is what Bitcoin is actually for. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Compile headline screenshots from Google (royalty-free screenshots of public news). Use CapCut auto-captions. Fast cut rhythm — 0.5s per headline. No face needed; entirely phone-filmable. Hashtags: #bitcoin #crypto #bitcoinlightning #financialfreedom.

organic-pov-you-just-deposited-to-your-s.hook: POV: You just deposited to your sportsbook in 3 seconds flat — no card declines, no waiting

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-7s): Creator frustrated at phone — 'Card declined. Again. I just want to deposit $50, why is this so hard?' Beat 2 (8-25s): Screen-record — opens Speed Wallet, taps 'Send via Lightning invoice', pastes sportsbook address, hits send. Timer on screen: 2.8 seconds. Beat 3 (26-45s): Sportsbook balance refreshes, funds appear — 'Instantly funded. No bank drama.' Beat 4 (46-60s): Creator to camera — 'Bitcoin Lightning. No fees, no holds, no declined transactions. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Screen-record the deposit flow on a real Lightning-compatible sportsbook. Blur the sportsbook brand logo to stay within Meta ad policy. Overlay a countdown timer graphic in CapCut. Keep energy high-tempo. Hashtags: #bitcoin #igaming #sportsbetting #cryptodeposit.

organic-i-gave-my-mom-her-first-bitcoin-.hook: I gave my mom her first Bitcoin in 60 seconds — she thought it was complicated

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator with older family member (or implied via voiceover) — 'My mom thinks crypto is rocket science. So I proved her wrong.' Beat 2 (9-28s): Screen-record — creator opens Speed Wallet, taps 'Send', enters mom's phone number or QR scan, sends $20 in Bitcoin. She receives a push notification. Beat 3 (29-45s): Mom's reaction (genuine) — 'That's it? That was faster than Venmo.' Beat 4 (46-60s): Creator to camera — 'No seed phrases. No exchanges. Just Bitcoin on your phone. Download link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Film the reaction authentically — unscripted parental confusion-to-delight arc is the content. One phone, natural light. Use Instagram's built-in text overlays. This format has high share velocity among 25-40 demographic. Hashtags: #bitcoin #cryptoforbeginners #lightning #moneytips.

paid-you-sent-300-your-family-got-258-he.hook: You sent $300. Your family got $258. Here's the $42 you've been losing every month.
paid-you-sent-300-your-family-got-258-he.estimate: $1.80-$2.60 (42-57% below $3.17 benchmark; loss-framing + precise fee math drives high CTR in remittance cohort)

payload.problem: Voiceover over animated money graphic bleeding away: 'Wire transfer fees. FX markups. Processing cuts. Every major remittance service takes 5-15% before your money reaches home — and they count on you not noticing.'
payload.solution: Screen-record of Speed Wallet send: sender enters $300, recipient line shows $300.00. Bold text overlay: 'Bitcoin Lightning. Zero fees. Arrives in seconds. Works in 50+ countries.' Creator face-to-camera closer: 'Your family deserves every dollar you send.'
payload.cta: Text on screen + VO: 'Download Speed Wallet — send your first $0-fee transfer today. Link below.'
payload.audience: Meta (Facebook + Instagram): Lookalike 1% of existing remittance users; Interest stack — 'sending money internationally' + 'Western Union' + 'Remitly' + country-of-origin targeting (Mexico, Philippines, India, Nigeria, El Salvador). Ages 22-45.

paid-what-if-your-first-bitcoin-took-60-.hook: What if your first Bitcoin took 60 seconds to get — and cost you nothing?
paid-what-if-your-first-bitcoin-took-60-.estimate: $2.50-$3.10 (near benchmark; curiosity gap + zero-barrier CTA should hold CPIs competitive vs. category average of $3.17)

payload.problem: Talking-head creator, relatable tone: 'Every time I tried to get into crypto I hit a wall — confusing exchanges, ID verification that takes days, minimum deposits, fees just to get started. I gave up twice.'
payload.solution: Screen-record walkthrough: download Speed Wallet, create account (no KYC friction shown), receive $5 in Bitcoin from a friend via Lightning in real time. VO: 'No exchange. No seed phrase. No minimums. Just Bitcoin on your phone, sent person-to-person, instantly, free.' End card: 'Over [X] people already use it.'
payload.cta: VO + animated button: 'Get your first Bitcoin free — download Speed Wallet now.'
payload.audience: TikTok Ads: Interest targeting — 'cryptocurrency' + 'personal finance' + 'fintech apps' + behavioral: engaged with crypto content last 30 days but NO prior crypto purchase signals (true crypto-curious). Ages 18-34. Gender-balanced.

paid-card-declined-withdrawal-pending-3-.hook: Card declined. Withdrawal pending 3-5 days. There's a better way to move money in and out of your game.
paid-card-declined-withdrawal-pending-3-.estimate: $2.90-$3.80 (iGaming segment has smaller tracked volume per track data; tighter audience = slightly elevated CPIs possible, but pain-point specificity should keep below $4)

payload.problem: Creator at desk, mildly exasperated: 'I just won $400 and now I'm waiting 72 hours for a bank transfer to clear. Meanwhile my card was declined on the deposit side — fraud flag, apparently. This happens every single time.'
payload.solution: Screen-record: Speed Wallet open, Lightning invoice from sportsbook pasted, send tapped — '3 seconds. Done.' Withdrawal flow shown: funds back in Speed Wallet in under 10 seconds. VO: 'Bitcoin Lightning — instant deposits, instant withdrawals, zero fees, zero bank interference. Works 24/7.'
payload.cta: Bold text + VO: 'Play faster. Download Speed Wallet — instant Lightning deposits, link in bio.'
payload.audience: Meta (Instagram + Facebook): Interest stack — 'online sports betting' + 'DraftKings' + 'FanDuel' + 'online casino' + 'cryptocurrency payments'. Behavioral: frequent app purchasers. Ages 21-45, male-skewed 70/30. Exclude jurisdictions with iGaming ad restrictions.
